name: Ocal Browser V7.6.12
body:
OCAL BROWSER - UPDATE CATALOG
Version: 7.6.12
Release Date: July 16, 2026

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[PACKAGING SYSTEM & BRANDING FIXES]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* CORRECTED ELECTRON PACKAGING: Migrated the distribution compiler script to package fresh assets directly from the electron-builder workspace to avoid serving stale default resources.
* OS TASKBAR IDENTIFICATION: Injected native AppUserModelID metadata properties onto all system shortcut icons, ensuring that Windows aggregates taskbar tabs under 'Ocal Browser' instead of the generic 'Electron' group name.
* CUSTOM LOGO & BRANDING ENHANCEMENT: Replaced any fallback placeholder icons inside executable resource containers with high-resolution stable branding ico files.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[STYLE STUDIO TRANSITIONS & LIGHT MODE OVERHAUL]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* THEME MODE SWITCHER: Integrated a unified Dark/Light theme mode controller directly at the top of the Style Studio panel.
* HIGH CONTRAST FOOTER COMMAND DOCK: Redesigned the homepage footer capsule to feature solid, high-contrast white background and dark text on light mode to prevent low-contrast overlaps.
* SOLID STYLE DRAWERS: Replaced translucent glass customizer backgrounds with clean, solid #0f0f11 (Dark) and #f4f4f7 (Light) panels for enhanced professional aesthetics.
